title: How to Avoid a Climate Disaster
author: Bill Gates
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A bar chart of the 51 GT of greenhouse gas emissions by sector. The biggest (electricity) is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <g>
      <rect x="-700" y="-100" width="200" height="400" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="-600" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.18em">27%</text>
      <text x="-600" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">ELECTRICITY</text>
      <rect x="-460" y="0" width="200" height="300" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <text x="-360" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#0a0a0a" letter-spacing="0.18em">19%</text>
      <text x="-360" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">MANUFACTURING</text>
      <rect x="-220" y="80" width="200" height="220" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
      <text x="-120" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.18em">14%</text>
      <text x="-120" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">AGRICULTURE</text>
      <rect x="20" y="140" width="200" height="160" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
      <text x="120" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.18em">10%</text>
      <text x="120" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">TRANSPORT</text>
      <rect x="260" y="200" width="200" height="100" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.7"/>
      <text x="360" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.18em">6%</text>
      <text x="360" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">OTHER</text>
    </g>
    <line x1="-740" y1="300" x2="500" y2="300" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="0" y="-180" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">51 GT CO₂e / YEAR · 0 BY 2050</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A bar chart of the 51 GT of emissions by sector. The biggest (Electricity, 27%) is RED — the one to fix first. 220px weight-500 title at the top.
